title: ISic000028. I.Sicily inscription 000028
body:
Text encoding: Tuuli Ahlholm; edition source: https://www.zotero.org/groups/382445/items/FZWWPUD6
1Ti(berio) · Claudio · Herodi-
2ano · c(larissimo) · v(iro) · leg(ato) · prov(inciae) · Si-
3cil(iae) · iudici · rarissi-
4mo · patrono · col(oniae)
5Panhormit(anorum) · princi-
6pales · viri · ex · aere col-
7lato (vac.3) d(ono) · d(ederunt)

Text encoding: Tuuli Ahlholm; edition source: https://www.zotero.org/groups/382445/items/FZWWPUD6
1TI·CLAUDIO·HERODI
2ANO·C·V·LEG·PROV·SI
3CIL·IUDICI·RARISSI
4MO·PATRONO·COL
5PANHORMIT·PRINCI
6PALES·VIRI·EX·AERECOL
7LATO      D·D

Facsimile Images

Apparatus criticus

  • Text of ILMusPalermo

English translation

Tuuli Ahlholm

To Tiberius Claudius Herodianus, a most distinguished man (i.e. of senatorial rank), most extraordinary judge, patron of the colony of Panhormitans. The foremost men (of the colony) gave (this monument) as a gift from communally collected bronze.

commentary

bibliography

  • 2938 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10000352
  • Mommsen 1883 7286 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10000589
  • Bivona 1970 28 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10002142
  • Manganaro 1988 43 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001427

Tall, relatively narrow letters, with short horizontal strokes often curving upwards (especially on T).

Line 1 95 Line 2 75-80 Line 3 70-75 Line 4-5 65 Line 6 60 Line 7 55 Interlineation line 1 to 2
